'''Bothel''' was a top hat-wearing trunked sentient who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] with his partner [[Trud]]. The pair, who enjoyed frolicking in the mud, used the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Malani]] to get the [[Sunstar/Legends|sunstar]].

{{Char-stub}}
